# Olof Lundh: "Herrlandslaget gör en vinst på 50 miljoner för att delta i VM"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-30  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode of Börsmorgon features sports journalist Olof Lundh discussing the economics of the Swedish Football Association around its 2026 World Cup participation rather than equity markets. Key themes are the guaranteed FIFA payout (12 million USD / ~120 million SEK gross, ~50 million SEK net) and the indirect commercial boosts to sponsors like Adidas and Svenska Spel. No tradeable investment theses on listed equities are offered.
